notes: Off-chain proposals don't produce calldata — they POST a JSON body to the backend API. The description field is JSON.stringify(SlateDescendant[]). Compare the stringified Slate output from the MCP against what the frontend would send. Capture via network request interception instead of eth_sendTransaction hook.
